segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: There's an old soul in these dogs and they appreciate you in a way that a puppy can't.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Muffill is a senior dog rescue. We save senior dogs and find them fabulous new homes. We get dogs in all sorts of conditions. And because they're old they even have more

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: With the matching funds we got from the Subaru grant, we got to set up our own veterinarian team

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: because we don't want to see any dogs suffer once it steps through our doors.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: I'm not sure that Ava rescued me or I rescued her.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: My oldest granddaughter is now 12 and the younger one is 9. I watched them initially twice a week and I loved that as they were older and they have their various activities and friends. I don't babysit as much. I miss them already. It's very important for me to have somebody to take

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: care of. It's just my nature. I need to have that. So one night I was looking through

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: all the senior dogs that were available and I saw Ava and I thought, oh my God, this is it.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: When I had read her bio, said she had a heart murmur, but when Sherry told me that she required heart surgery

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: I was pretty taken aback. They just really weren't sure that Ava would even

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: make it through the night. What Subaru did with CNN Heroes really allowed us to change our game.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Because we had our own vet, we could see what was going on and save that dog's life.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: If I don't feel needed, then I don't feel loved.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: I need her, so therefore love exists.
